residual_findings.title: clap `--yes` help text for `creator works reconcile-chapters` over-promises an inline preview that `confirm_reconcile_interactive` does not print in the default flow
residual_findings.source: qc1 W-1 (architecture/maintainability); raised in wave-1 (2026-06-17) qc-consolidated.md
residual_findings.closure_note: V1.49 P2 W-1 fix wave (commit bdd646dc, merged at 0b98e194): clap --yes doc comment updated to skip confirmation prompt (no preview promise); preview routed to --dry-run. 1-line handler doc change + new regression test works_reconcile_chapters_help_yes_does_not_promise_inline_preview. No handler code changed (confirm_reconcile_interactive / handle_reconcile_chapters untouched). All tests pass (84 lib + 11 integration creator_works). Targeted re-review: qc-specialist Approve @ e7848336.
